metadata.title: Contact Us — Get in Touch with the Billix Team
metadata.description: Have a question or need help? Reach out to the Billix team. We'd love to hear from you about partnerships, enterprise needs, or general inquiries.
metadata.ogDescription: Have a question or need help? Reach out to the Billix team.

heading.title: Contact us
heading.description: Whether you have a question, need support, or want to explore how Billix can fit into your workflow, our team is ready. Drop us a message, and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

form.title: Get In Touch

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Anything you would like us to know?

form.terms: By clicking ‘Send Message’ you’re confirming that you agree with our <link>Terms and Conditions</link>
